notes: Avellaneda-Lee PCA s-score statistical arbitrage (Hudson & Thames PCA Approach). A FIXED 6-symbol universe (FX majors + US indices) is PCA-decomposed each closed D1 bar: the daily-return correlation matrix is eigendecomposed via deterministic symmetric Jacobi rotation (NO ML / no sklearn), each asset's standardized returns are OLS-regressed on the top-k principal-component factor returns, the regression residual is cumulated into an OU process fit closed-form as AR(1), and the s-score (X-m)/sigma_eq drives mean-reversion entries on the host residual. The EA runs one instance per registered host symbol; every instance computes the SAME universe-wide PCA and trades only its own host residual. Foreign .DWX reads bound at call site via QM_SymbolGuardInit + QM_BasketWarmupHistory; one position per magic on the host. All listed symbols verified present in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv. No external non-MT5 feed; closes read from the .DWX tester only.
